prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年电子科技大学在陕西理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约3025名→2929名→3104名→3485名→3417名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约500名；2025年基准位次约3417名；该校在陕西理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年85人、2022年87人、2023年93人、2024年91人、2025年85人；2026年计划大幅增至115人，较2025年扩招约35.3%，显著增加招生名额，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 电子科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第33名，近年排名稳定在28–33区间，属于国内顶尖电子信息类高校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学校管理回应与师德师风事件，但影响范围有限；抖音热度为较热（总排名第33，视频数27条），短视频平台关注度处于中上水平；2022年曾出现投档线异常信号（被视作黑马），近年未见明显断档记录；电子科学与技术A+、信息与通信工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、仪器科学与技术A-、光学工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，电子信息与计算机领域学科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度为高热推荐，计算机类持续推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，均为该校核心招生方向；陕西2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争加剧；电子科技大学位于四川成都（邻省），对陕西考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在陕西招生占比约1.8%（2025年），属中等偏下水平，非主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3417名、2026年大幅扩招35.3%的供给增加、陕西物理类考生增长19.7%的需求上升，以及电子信息类专业持续高热的社会热度，供需两端均有显著变化。扩招幅度大于考生增幅，但电子科大作为顶尖985信息类名校，报考热度不减。预测2026年最低录取位次约4171名，区间3671–4671名。

一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（成电英才电子与计算机科技创新领军人才计划）
- 计算机科学与技术（智能金融与区块链金融双A联合学位实验班）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、数据科学与大数据技术等）。

二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（信息与通信）
- 工科试验班（电子工程类）
- 集成电路设计与集成系统（国家示范性微电子学院）
- 工科试验班（机器人、电气信息、智能制造）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 经济管理试验班（管理与电子工程双学位培养）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4171名，区间3671–4671名。位次在区间中上段（约3900名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（成电英才、计算机类）；位次在区间中段（约4100–4300名）以二档专业为主（信息与通信、电子工程、集成电路）；位次在区间下段（约4400名以后）建议三档专业保底（软件工程沙河校区、经济管理试验班）。电子科大以电子信息与计算机为核心优势，报考时优先选择与A+学科直接相关的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for UESTC in Shaanxi science (physics category) were approximately 3025 → 2929 → 3104 → 3485 → 3417, showing a fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 500 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3417. The enrollment plan for UESTC in Shaanxi science (physics category): 85 in 2021, 87 in 2022, 93 in 2023, 91 in 2024, 85 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 115, an expansion of about 35.3% compared to 2025, notably increasing admission slots, which helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: UESTC is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is about 33rd in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 28–33 range, making it a top domestic electronic information university; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents, but the impact is limited; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (total ranking 33rd, 27 videos), with short video platform attention at an upper-middle level; in 2022, there was an abnormal signal in the admission line (considered a dark horse), with no obvious gaps in recent years; Electronic Science and Technology A+, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, with top national strength in electronic information and computer fields, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic information/communication majors are highly recommended in 2024, computer majors continue to be recommended, and electrical engineering and automation are highly recommended, all core enrollment directions of the university; Shaanxi 2026 physics category candidates are about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition; UESTC is located in Chengdu, Sichuan (neighboring province), with strong regional appeal to Shaanxi candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.8% (2025), at a lower-middle level, not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3417, the significant 35.3% enrollment expansion in 2026 (supply increase), the 19.7% increase in Shaanxi physics category candidates (demand increase), and the sustained high social popularity of electronic information majors, both supply and demand have notable changes. The expansion rate is greater than the candidate increase rate, but as a top 985 information university, UESTC's application popularity remains high. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 4171, with a range of 3671–4671.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electronic Information (Chengdian Yingcai Electronic and Computer Technology Innovation Leading Talent Program)
- Computer Science and Technology (Smart Finance and Blockchain Finance Dual A Joint Degree Experimental Class)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Information and Communication)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Engineering)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated System (National Demonstration Microelectronics College)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics, Electrical Information, Intelligent Manufacturing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Software Engineering (Shahe Campus) (National Excellent Engineer Education and Training Plan Special Class)
- Software Engineering (Shahe Campus) (Industrial Digital Intelligence)
- Economic Management Experimental Class (Management and Electronic Engineering Dual Degree Training)
- Finance (Digital Intelligence Finance and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 4171, range 3671–4671. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (about within 3900) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Chengdian Yingcai, Computer Category); those with rankings in the middle part (about 4100–4300) should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Information and Communication, Electronic Engineering, Integrated Circuit); those with rankings in the lower part (about after 4400) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors (Software Engineering Shahe Campus, Economic Management Experimental Class). UESTC's core strengths are electronic information and computers; when applying, prioritize majors directly related to A+ disciplines.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年电子科技大学在陕西文科（历史类）最低录取位次分别为约990名→938名→1926名→1344名→1265名，波动较大，2023年出现明显后移后2024–2025年有所回升；2025年基准位次约1265名；该校在陕西文科（历史类）招生计划：2021–2024年均为5人，2025年增至9人，2026年维持9人，计划持平。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流；软科排名约第33名，属国内顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉偏负面（两起校内事件），但主要涉及理工科领域，对文科报考影响有限；抖音热度较热（总排名33），整体关注度中上；电子科大文科专业较少，主要涉及外国语言文学类和社会科学试验班，对应学科评估中外国语言文学未单独评级，法学、公共管理等未列入该校A类学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 陕西2026年历史类考生约88500人，较2025年75641人增加约17.0%，竞争加剧；省控线2025年历史类本科批414分；外国语言文学类专业社会热度一般观望，社会科学类热度平稳；电子科大位于四川成都（邻省），对陕西文科考生有一定地域吸引力；该校文科招生计划极少（仅9人），竞争集中度高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1265名、招生计划持平、陕西历史类考生增长17.0%导致竞争加剧，以及电子科大文科专业少、非其优势领域等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次小幅后移。预测约1285名，区间1092–1478名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）

- 英语（AI交叉复合型创新人才双学位培养计划）。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1285名，区间1092–1478名。电子科大文科招生仅9人，专业选择有限。位次在区间上段（约1100名以内）可冲刺社会科学试验班（数智公共治理）和英语AI双学位；位次在区间中段（约1200–1350名）以外国语言文学类为主；位次在区间下段（约1400名以后）以英语（语言认知与国际传播）保底。建议文科考生同时关注其他综合性985高校的文科专业作为备选。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for UESTC in Shaanxi's liberal arts (history category) were approximately 990 → 938 → 1926 → 1344 → 1265, with significant fluctuations; a notable backward shift in 2023 was followed by a recovery in 2024–2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1265; the enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shaanxi: 5 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 9 in 2025, maintained at 9 in 2026, with a stable plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 33rd in the Soft Science Ranking, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; reputation in 2026 is slightly negative (two campus incidents), but mainly related to science and engineering fields, with limited impact on liberal arts admissions; Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 33), with moderate to high overall attention; UESTC has few liberal arts majors, mainly involving Foreign Languages and Literature and Social Science Experimental Class, with corresponding discipline evaluations: Foreign Languages and Literature not separately rated, Law, Public Administration, etc., not listed in the university's A-class disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shaanxi is about 88,500, an increase of approximately 17.0% compared to 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line for the 2025 history category undergraduate batch is 414 points; social popularity of Foreign Languages and Literature majors is generally lukewarm, while Social Science majors are stable; UESTC is located in Chengdu, Sichuan (neighboring province), with some regional appeal for Shaanxi liberal arts examinees; the university's liberal arts enrollment plan is extremely small (only 9 students), leading to high concentration of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1265, a stable enrollment plan, a 17.0% increase in Shaanxi history category examinees leading to intensified competition, and UESTC's few liberal arts majors which are not its strengths, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward. Predicted ranking: approximately 1285, with a range of 1092–1478.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Digital Intelligence Public Governance) (Administrative Management, Urban Management, Law)
- English (AI Cross-Disciplinary Composite Innovative Talent Dual Degree Training Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (AI Cross-Disciplinary Composite Innovative Talent Dual Degree Training Program) (English, Japanese, French).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- English (Language Cognition and International Communication).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking: approximately 1285, with a range of 1092–1478. UESTC's liberal arts enrollment is only 9 students, with limited major choices. Candidates with rankings in the upper segment of the range (within about 1100) can aim for Social Science Experimental Class (Digital Intelligence Public Governance) and English AI Dual Degree; those in the middle segment (about 1200–1350) should focus on Foreign Languages and Literature; those in the lower segment (after about 1400) should use English (Language Cognition and International Communication) as a safety option. It is recommended that liberal arts candidates also consider liberal arts majors at other comprehensive 985 universities as alternatives.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China
